name: Do I really need a lawyer for forklift work injury or DIY?
description: Yes—higher payouts, handle complexities, no upfront cost.

mainEntity.name: Do I really need a lawyer for forklift work injury or DIY?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes—higher payouts, handle complexities, no upfront cost.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, insurers lowball without one; attorneys boost settlements 2-3x.** Free consult, no win no fee.[3] Key factors: Navigate denials, third-party ID, deadlines. Handle paperwork/evidentiary fights. Essential for fair value.
